info.name: AppyWay Gets the basic authority information for all authorities that you are entitled to access

items.docs: Gets the basic authority information for all authorities that you are entitled to access

info.name: AppyWay Get Full Authority By Slug

params.name: slug
params.description: The name of the authority. You can find this by making a request to the getAll endpoint

params.name: maxDate
params.description: Format - date-time (as date-time in RFC3339). The date at which you wish to view the restrictions

items.docs:
Returns an object which has the location of the documents containing the full restrictions of an authority
The documentation provided here shows the model you will find at these locations. The initial object contains only the URL's.
You will have to fetch the documents from the returned authority URL's

info.name: AppyWay Fetch basic authority information for all authorities that you are entitled to access

items.docs: Fetch basic authority information for all authorities that you are entitled to access

info.name: AppyWay Fetch the basic authority information by slug

items.docs: Returns the the basic authority information by slug (authority name)

info.name: AppyWay Fetch Full Authority By Slug

items.docs:
Returns an object which has the location of the documents containing the full restrictions of an authority
The documentation provided here shows the model you will find at these locations. The initial object contains only the URL's.
You will have to fetch the documents from the returned authority URL's

info.name: AppyWay Export Authority moving Restrictions as GeoJSON by ID

params.name: authorityId
params.description: Format - uuid. The ID of the authority.

params.name: restrictions
params.description: The set of moving restriction IDs. If left empty will export all allowed restrictions

items.docs: Returns a GeoJSON containing the moving restrictions of an authority.

info.name: AppyWay Export Authority static Restrictions as GeoJSON by ID

params.name: authorityId
params.description: Format - uuid. The ID of the authority.

params.name: restrictions
params.description: The set of static restriction IDs. If left empty will export all allowed restrictions

items.docs: Returns a GeoJSON containing the restrictions of an authority.

info.name: AppyWay Export Authority static Restrictions as GeoJSON by a given slug.

params.name: slug
params.description: The slug used to identify the authority eg. hackney

params.name: restrictions
params.description: The set of static restriction IDs. If left empty will export all allowed restrictions

items.docs: Returns a GeoJSON containing the moving restrictions of an authority.

info.name: AppyWay Executes a Web Feature Service (WFS) query.

items.docs: Executes a Web Feature Service (WFS) query.
Returns Status (pong) of the API service
